displayNameZh: 怎么持续触及有痛点的人群
summary: Yt Think Distribution component for Remotion.
summaryZh: 适用于 Remotion 的「怎么持续触及有痛点的人群」组件。

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/yt-think-distribution/src/YtThinkDistribution.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `YtThinkDistribution` and `ytThinkDistributionDefaultProps`, then register the composition.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Yt Think Distribution Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/yt-think-distribution to my project. Preserve the exported YtThinkDistributionProps API and register the YtThinkDistribution composition with the default props.
